concepts.name: Recursion
concepts.description: A problem-solving approach where a function calls itself on smaller subproblems.

concepts.name: Data Structure
concepts.description: A way of organizing data so operations are efficient and understandable.

concepts.name: Tree
concepts.description: A hierarchical data structure made of connected nodes.

concepts.name: Pointer
concepts.description: A reference to another location or object in memory.

concepts.name: Space Complexity
concepts.description: How memory usage grows as input size increases.

concepts.name: Time Complexity
concepts.description: How running time grows as input size increases.
